items.name: 🎭🦊 White-black Cursed Japanese Kitsune Mask
items.description:
🛑 Available in other colors:

[PBR] 🎭🦊 Golden: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/76790838687068
🎭🦊 Azure-Silver: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/126257726812265
🎭🦊 Dark-black: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/117924534020876
🎭🦊 White-cyan: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/78596013563981
🎭🦊 White-red: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/96741459988439

The Kitsune mask, with its sly grin and piercing eyes, draws directly from the heart of Japanese mythology.
Kitsune (狐) — the fox spirit — is a shapeshifting yōkai, known for its cunning, magic, and mysterious duality.
While some Kitsune are benevolent messengers of the kami Inari, others become tricksters, or even vengeful spirits when wronged.

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale
